intro: A wall of crystal-clear ice rises ahead, and within it you can make out the frozen shadows of Pokemon, perfectly preserved. A cache glints somewhere behind the shapes.
title: Frozen Shapes
description: Pokemon shapes are frozen in a clear wall of ice, a cache locked behind them. Name the shapes to chip out the right find - the more you read correctly, the richer the cache. Or leave the ice be.

1.label: Read the shapes
1.tooltip: (+) The cache scales with how many shapes you name right
1.selected: You peer into the ice and start matching each frozen shadow to its Pokemon...

2.label: Leave the ice
2.selected: You leave the frozen wall undisturbed and move on.
